prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic double exposure portrait of a stylish little child standing confidently on a floating wooden platform above soft golden clouds during sunset. The child has curly messy hair, wearing round black sunglasses, a dusty pink oversized linen shirt with rolled sleeves, white trousers, and clean white sneakers. Hands casually inside pockets, calm confident expression, looking slightly upward like a dreamer.

Behind the child is a giant semi-transparent artistic portrait of the same child blended beautifully into the glowing sunset sky. Warm golden sunlight illuminates the face and clouds, creating an ethereal dreamy atmosphere. Dramatic cinematic lighting, soft volumetric clouds, realistic skin texture, highly detailed hair, luxury fashion editorial style, fantasy-inspired composition, warm orange and beige tones, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, masterpiece quality, 8K resolution.
